## What this PR changes

## Type
- [ ] Editorial (typo, formatting, link, clarification — no normative change)
- [ ] AHP — substantive specification change (new event type, required field, conformance level, schema_version)
- [ ] Conformance test rig
- [ ] Reference implementation note (non-normative)

## AHP reference
If this is a substantive change, link the corresponding `PROPOSALS/AHP-NNN-*.md` file. Editorial changes do not need an AHP.

## Backwards-compatibility impact
- [ ] No breaking change
- [ ] Breaking change (deprecation window of at least 9 months per GOVERNANCE.md)

## Sign-off
By submitting this pull request:
- [ ] Every commit is signed off via DCO (`git commit -s`). See [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/).
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under the Apache License 2.0 (see [`LICENSE`](../LICENSE)).
- [ ] No "Co-Authored-By LLM" or AI-authorship metadata in commit messages.
